title: Eragrostis refracta
taxonomy: Eragrostis refracta is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a member of the subfamily Chloridoideae. Within the genus Eragrostis, it is often grouped with other similar species. However, more specific classification details may vary depending on the source. uses: Eragrostis refracta is a plant known for its potential medicinal uses, particularly in traditional African medicine. It is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may be beneficial in treating various health conditions.
